zh.lifeSummary: 當Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd於1330年出生在英國威爾斯丹比爾盧阿邦時，他的父親Gruffydd ap Madog of Glyndyfrdwy51歲，母親Elizabeth le Strange47歲。他於1350年與Eleanor ferch Thomas在英國威爾斯梅利奧爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1370年在英國威爾斯丹比爾格林-迪福德享年40歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯福林爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd于1330年出生在英国威尔斯丹比爾盧阿邦时，他的父亲Gruffydd ap Madog of Glyndyfrdwy51岁，母亲Elizabeth le Strange47岁。他于1350年与Eleanor ferch Thomas在英国威尔斯梅利奧爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1370年在英国威尔斯丹比爾格林-迪福德享年40岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯福林爾。

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd was born in 1330, in Ruabon, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Gruffydd ap Madog of Glyndyfrdwy, was 51 and his mother, Elizabeth le Strange, was 47. He married Eleanor ferch Thomas in 1350, in Merionethshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1370, in Glyn-Dyfrdwy, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 40, and was buried in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd est né en 1330, à Ruabon, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gruffydd ap Madog of Glyndyfrdwy, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth le Strange, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor ferch Thomas en 1350, à Merionethshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1370, à Glyn-Dyfrdwy, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd 1330 in Ruabon, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gruffydd ap Madog of Glyndyfrdwy 51 und seine Mutter Elizabeth le Strange 47. Er hat 1350 in Merionethshire, Wales, United Kingdom Eleanor ferch Thomas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1370 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Glyn-Dyfrdwy, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd è nato il nel 1330 nel Ruabon, Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gruffydd ap Madog of Glyndyfrdwy, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth le Strange, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor ferch Thomas nel 1350, nel Merionethshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1370, nel Glyn-Dyfrdwy, Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Flintshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffyddが1330年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアルアボンで生まれた時，父Gruffydd ap Madog of Glyndyfrdwyは51歳，母Elizabeth le Strangeは47歳であった。1350年にイギリスウェールズメリオンエスシュアイアでEleanor ferch Thomasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1370年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアグリン-ディフルドウイで40歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd(이)가 1330년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 루압에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gruffydd ap Madog of Glyndyfrdwy(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth le Strange(은)는 47세였다. 그는 1350년 영국 웨일스 머이오네스실르에서 Eleanor ferch Thomas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1370년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 그리-디프르드w이에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd nasceu em 1330, em Ruabon, Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gruffydd ap Madog of Glyndyfrdwy, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth le Strange, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor ferch Thomas em 1350, em Merionethshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1370, em Glyn-Dyfrdwy, Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Flintshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd родился в 1330 г. в местности руабон, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gruffydd ap Madog of Glyndyfrdwy было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth le Strange, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor ferch Thomas в 1350 г. в местности мириоунетшир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1370 г. в местности глин-дифрдви, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd nació en 1330, en Ruabon, Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gruffydd ap Madog of Glyndyfrdwy, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Elizabeth le Strange, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Eleanor ferch Thomas en 1350, en Merionethshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1370, en Glyn-Dyfrdwy, Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Flintshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
